category_sources: Official README describes a Ruby script for checking LaTeX writing style rules.
source_facts.description says it parses LaTeX-formatted text in search of forbidden phrases.
display_name_sources: Official README title is style-check.rb for the style-check package.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official README page, which documents usage, rules, limitations, and download.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official README provides tarball downloads but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official README documents the Ruby script, LaTeX input, forbidden expressions, and command-line usage.
